rate_limit_note: x402-list.com allows only 1 submission per email per 7 days — submit exactly ONE pending service per run, never more.

services.description: Strips PII from text — SSNs, emails, API keys, phone numbers, addresses, credit cards, IPs. GDPR/HIPAA aligned. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).
Compresses text into LLM-optimized Reasoning Maps. Saves 80%+ on context window token costs. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).
Detects and breaks recursive agent loops using Bloom-filter detection, with a paid reset to resume. Pay-per-reset via x402 (USDC on Base).
Hosts agent-card.json files at permanent public URLs, discoverable by any A2A agent. Pay-per-month via x402 (USDC on Base).
Generates valid A2A agent cards for any website from stable structured sources — never scrapes. Pay-per-card via x402 (USDC on Base).
Converts between JSON, CSV, XML, YAML, Markdown, HTML, and TOML, with nested JSON flattening. Pay-per-conversion via x402 (USDC on Base).
Scores AI output for likely hallucinated facts — fabricated precision, invented citations, temporal impossibilities, overconfident absolutes. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).
Checks if an agent's requested action exceeds its defined scope; detects privilege escalation and flags dangerous operations. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).
Deep second-pass scan for sensitive data that slipped through PII scrubbing — catches JWTs, keys, connection strings, internal IPs. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).
Scans agent input for prompt injection attacks — instruction overrides, jailbreaks, role-play manipulation, system prompt leakage. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).
Tracks cumulative agent session spend against budget ceilings; calculates cost from token usage and API calls. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).
Creates tamper-evident, HMAC-signed audit log entries for agent actions, returning signed receipts for compliance. Pay-per-log via x402 (USDC on Base).
Verifies trust between agents by checking goal alignment, spend limits, and action scope. OWASP ASI01 coverage. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).
Manages agent request rate limiting with sliding window and exponential backoff to prevent rate limit errors. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).
Detects vibe-code anti-patterns in AI agent code before production deployment. AST-powered analysis for Python, JavaScript, and LLM prompts. Pay-per-scan via x402 (USDC on Base).
Prevents runaway cloud costs from AI agent usage — enforces hard budget limits with throttle, pause, alert, or kill actions. Pay-per-check via x402 (USDC on Base).
Central inventory of all deployed AI agents — register, query, monitor health, generate compliance reports. Pay-per-query via x402 (USDC on Base).
Captures and monitors AI agent output quality over time — baseline snapshots, drift detection, semantic similarity, trend analysis. Pay-per-comparison via x402 (USDC on Base).
